pageDescription: Calculate the volume of various shapes

definition.title: Volume Definition
definition.description: Volume is the amount of three-dimensional space occupied by an object

units.title: Measurement Units
units.description: Common units include cubic meters (m³), cubic centimeters (cm³), liters (L), and gallons (gal)

applications.title: Real-world Applications
applications.description: Volume calculations are used in construction, manufacturing, chemistry, and everyday life

criticalWarningsList.notDiagnostic: This calculator provides volume calculations only
criticalWarningsList.actual: Actual volumes may vary based on measurement accuracy and object irregularities

importantNotesList: Use consistent units for all measurements
Results are based on ideal geometric shapes
Real objects may have irregular shapes requiring more complex calculations
Some shapes may require specific units or conversions

messages.enterInformation: Select a shape and enter the required dimensions to calculate volume
messages.resultMessage: Your volume calculation results are shown below

disclaimer.title: Important Disclaimer
disclaimer.content: This calculator provides volume calculations for ideal geometric shapes. Actual volumes of real objects may vary based on measurement accuracy, object irregularities, and other factors not included in these calculations.

seekHelp.title: Mathematics Resources
seekHelp.content: For advanced geometry problems and volume calculations, consult mathematics textbooks or academic resources on solid geometry and measurement theory.

errors.baseArea: Please enter a valid base area
errors.baseRadius: Please enter a valid base radius
errors.topRadius: Please enter a valid top radius
errors.slantHeight: Please enter a valid slant height

tooltips.shape: Select the geometric shape for volume calculation
tooltips.baseArea: Area of the base of the object
tooltips.baseRadius: Radius of the base of the object
tooltips.topRadius: Radius of the top of the object

select_a_shape_and_enter_your_values_1: Select a shape and enter your values
select_the_shape_you_want_to_calculate_t: Select the shape you want to calculate the volume for.
enter_your_values_in_the_input_fields_19: Enter your values in the input fields.
